title: lactaria glomerata
intro: Lactaria glomerata, also known as the scalycap mushroom or shaggy ink cap, is a type of edible fungus that belongs to the family Russulaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lactaria glomerata include reducing the risk of cancer, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the mushroom is often dried, powdered, and used in capsules, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
